title: Change API key and text model in api.config.ts
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Swapping the defaults
gist.blurb: Updated our internal configuration for default API keys and text models. Just keeping the gears turning smoothly behind the scenes.
gist.summary: Updated the default API key and text model configuration in the frontend.
gist.impact: Ensures the frontend uses the latest default credentials and models for text generation.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot adjusting some gears or swapping out a glowing cartridge (representing a model/key) in a retro terminal. Nomnom creature eating the old config file.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot swapping a glowing lime green (#ecf874) cartridge into a retro computer terminal. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats a stack of old paper configs nearby. Soft pastel gradient background, chunky sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot swapping a glowing lime green (#ecf874) cartridge into a retro computer terminal. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats a stack of old paper configs nearby. Soft pastel gradient background, chunky sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
